# FreightMynd

> AI-powered operations intelligence for sea, air & freight forwarders. Custom-built AI systems that replace manual freight operations. Built by Bitontree. Trusted by Hellmann Worldwide Logistics.

FreightMynd builds custom AI automation systems for freight forwarding companies. Unlike SaaS tools, every system is purpose-built for the client's specific TMS, suppliers, document formats, and workflows. Systems are deployed in 4-8 weeks.

## Solutions

- [4PL Control Tower Automation](https://freightmynd.com/solutions/4pl-control-tower-automation): Full document intelligence pipeline — email monitoring to CargoWise XML with zero manual entry. 60% processing time reduction.
- [Autonomous Quote Management](https://freightmynd.com/solutions/autonomous-quote-management): Automated RFQ intake, rate comparison, margin optimization, and freight quote generation in minutes.
- [Document Intelligence](https://freightmynd.com/solutions/document-intelligence): AI document processing for logistics — reads, classifies, and extracts data from invoices, AWBs, packing lists, and compliance documents.
- [Freight Pricing AI](https://freightmynd.com/solutions/freight-pricing-ai): Real-time freight rate benchmarking, dynamic pricing optimization, and margin analysis.
- [Sea Freight Automation](https://freightmynd.com/solutions/sea-freight-automation): End-to-end shipping AI for ocean freight — booking, documentation, tracking, and exception management.
- [Air Freight Automation](https://freightmynd.com/solutions/air-freight-automation): AI-powered AWB processing, air freight rates comparison, flight tracking, and customs documentation.
- [3PL & 4PL Operations](https://freightmynd.com/solutions/3pl-4pl-operations): Multi-client workflow orchestration, SLA monitoring, and scalable document processing.
- [Smart Invoice Processing](https://freightmynd.com/solutions/smart-invoice-processing): AI procurement automation — 3-way invoice matching, carrier rate audit, overcharge detection.

## TMS Integrations

Native AI integration with major freight management systems — no middleware, no CSV exports:

- [CargoWise](https://freightmynd.com/integrations/cargowise): Direct XML push via eHub and Universal Gateway
- [SAP TM](https://freightmynd.com/integrations/sap-tm): BAPI and RFC integration
- [Oracle TMS](https://freightmynd.com/integrations/oracle-tms): REST API integration
- [Microsoft Dynamics](https://freightmynd.com/integrations/microsoft-dynamics): Dataverse integration
- [Descartes](https://freightmynd.com/integrations/descartes): GLN integration

## Case Studies

- [Hellmann Worldwide Logistics](https://freightmynd.com/case-studies/hellmann-4pl-control-tower): 4PL control tower automation — 60% processing time reduction, zero manual TMS entry, near-zero failure on 300-page document batches.
- [RFQ Email Intelligence](https://freightmynd.com/case-studies/rfq-email-intelligence): AI-powered RFQ email intelligence and completion system.
- [Historical Email Intelligence](https://freightmynd.com/case-studies/historical-email-intelligence): AI institutional knowledge capture from operational email.
- [Shipping News Intelligence](https://freightmynd.com/case-studies/shipping-news-intelligence): Proactive freight risk detection and live disruption intelligence.
- [RFQ Email Automation](https://freightmynd.com/case-studies/rfq-email-automation): Automated RFQ processing and email automation system.

## Key Facts

- Founded: 2019
- Built by: Bitontree (https://bitontree.com)
- Flagship client: Hellmann Worldwide Logistics (500+ offices, 13,000+ employees)
- Deployment timeline: 4-8 weeks from kickoff to production
- Tech stack: Python, LangGraph, Azure, CargoWise API, OpenAI, custom OCR
- Offices: Clifton (US), Gujarat (India)
